overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring a rainy night drive through neon-lit urban highways and city streets. The player navigates through moderate traffic in a dystopian futuristic setting with heavy atmospheric fog and wet road reflections.

agents.ego_description: cruising along the elevated highway through heavy rain and fog, maintaining steady speed

entered.detail: concrete safety barrier running along the left side of the elevated highway
tall street lamps illuminating the foggy highway ahead
glowing cityscape visible through the heavy rain and fog in the distance

segments.scene_description: Driving along an elevated highway during a torrential downpour. The windshield wipers work continuously against the heavy rain as streetlights pierce through the fog. The road stretches ahead with concrete barriers lining the sides, while the distant city glows faintly through the mist.

events.description: approaching traffic light at highway interchange intersection
steering through the curved interchange ramp following road arrows

agents.ego_description: navigating the highway interchange, slowing for the curve and following traffic signals

notable_agents.action: white sedan ahead navigating the interchange turn

entered.detail: overhead traffic signal showing green light above the interchange
tall concrete retaining wall along the interchange ramp
green directional sign indicating exits and routes

segments.scene_description: Approaching a highway interchange with overhead traffic lights and directional signs. The vehicle navigates a curved concrete ramp, following a white sedan through the junction. The environment shifts from open highway to a more structured interchange with retaining walls.

events.description: exiting highway ramp into denser urban street with commercial buildings

agents.ego_description: driving through city streets following a white sedan, passing commercial buildings and digital billboards

notable_agents.action: white sedan maintaining steady speed ahead through city streets

entered.detail: multi-story commercial structures with illuminated windows lining the street
large glowing advertisement screens on building facades
tall palm trees visible along the sidewalk in the distance

segments.scene_description: Transitioning from the highway into city streets lined with commercial buildings and digital billboards. Following a white sedan through the wet streets, passing palm trees and various storefronts illuminated by neon and streetlights. The environment feels denser and more urban than the open highway.

events.description: stopping at red traffic light at busy intersection
proceeding through intersection as traffic light turns green

agents.ego_description: navigating through busier city streets, stopping at traffic lights and watching for pedestrians crossing in the rain

notable_agents.action: person with purple umbrella crossing the street in the rain

entered.detail: bright pink and blue neon signage on storefronts
traffic lights suspended over the intersection showing red then green
zebra crossing markings on the wet asphalt

segments.scene_description: Driving through a busier downtown area with increased pedestrian activity. Stopping at a red light near a crosswalk where a person with a purple umbrella is visible, then proceeding as the light turns green. Neon signs and storefronts line the wet streets, creating colorful reflections on the rain-soaked pavement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive that transitions from a desolate, rain-swept elevated highway into the dense, neon-lit heart of a futuristic city. It begins amidst a torrential downpour on an open road, where windshield wipers struggle against heavy rain and streetlights pierce through a thick, atmospheric fog. As the vehicle approaches a highway interchange, the open vista shifts into a structured series of curved concrete ramps and retaining walls while following a white sedan through the junction. The scene then expands into urban city streets, moving past palm trees and commercial buildings as the environment becomes denser and illuminated by glowing digital billboards. Finally, the camera glides into a busy downtown district, pausing at a red light beside a pedestrian with a purple umbrella before proceeding through a corridor of vibrant neon signs reflecting off the rain-soaked pavement.
